description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed male figure wearing a crown and a halo, holding a large feathered staff in his right hand and a book or tablet in his left. The figure stands on a rectangular plinth, with detailed drapery folds in the clothing and a prominent medallion or brooch at the chest. The face is expressive, with a full beard and a solemn expression. The halo is a thin metallic ring attached behind the head, and the feathered staff is tall and textured. The sculpture appears to be made of stone or concrete, with some metallic elements for the halo and staff tip. The overall surface is weathered, suggesting it is intended for outdoor display.
description: A crowned, robed male figure with a halo, holding a feathered staff and a book, stands on a rectangular plinth. The sculpture features detailed drapery and a weathered stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, facial details, crown, halo, feathered staff, and book held in the left hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the feathered staff and the layered drapery of the robe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the robe, the circular halo, and the plinth base.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the book/tablet and the side profile of the figure's face and crown.
attribute_subject_matter: crowned male figure with halo, feathered staff, and book
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate installation environment.
